PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.6.0\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "library\(funfield\); data\(speedingESJT\); str\(speedingESJT$PSI, max.level=1\); cat\('inherits df:', inherits\(speedingESJT$PSI, 'data.frame'\), '\\n'\)")

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.6.0\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "library\(funfield\); data\(speedingESJT\); cat\('class:', paste\(class\(speedingESJT$PSI\), collapse=','\), '\\n'\); cat\('names:', paste\(names\(speedingESJT$PSI\), collapse=','\), '\\n'\); cat\('dim:', paste\(dim\(speedingESJT$PSI\), collapse='x'\), '\\n'\); cat\('row 1 col 1:', as.character\(speedingESJT$PSI[1,1]\), '\\n'\)")

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.6.0\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "library\(funfield\); data\(speedingESJT\); cat\('top class:', paste\(class\(speedingESJT\), collapse=','\), '\\n'\); cat\('top names:', paste\(names\(speedingESJT\), collapse=','\), '\\n'\); for \(n in names\(speedingESJT\)\) cat\(sprintf\('  %s: %s\\n', n, paste\(class\(speedingESJT[[n]]\), collapse=','\)\)\)")

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.6.0\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "library\(funfield\); x <- speedingESJT$PSI; cat\('class:', paste\(class\(x\), collapse=','\), '\\n'\); cat\('is.df:', is.data.frame\(x\), '\\n'\); cat\('dim:', paste\(dim\(x\), collapse='x'\), '\\n'\); cat\('names:', paste\(head\(names\(x\), 15\), collapse=','\), '\\n'\)")
